title: Hero Flute Tune
info: Note: comma-prefix like ,S indicates lower octave

lines.indian: Re Dha: Ni Dha Ni Dha Ma Re~ Ma: Ga Re (x2)
lines.western: D A: B A B A F D~ F: E D (x2)

lines.indian: Ma Ma Ga~ Dha(k) Dha Ni: | Ni Re Sa, Ni Dha Dha(k) Ma Ga
lines.western: F F E~ Ab A B: | B D C, B A Ab F E

lines.indian: Re Dha: Ni Re Sa Re Sa Dha, Sa Re Sa Dha: Ma Re: Ma: Ga Re (x2)
lines.western: D A: B D C D C A, C D C A: F D: F: E D (x2)

lines.indian: Re Ma Ma Ga, Dha Dha Ni: Ni Re Re Sa:
lines.western: D F F E, A A B: B D D C:
